name: teammate-kit
description: Teammate orchestration plugin with an event-bus workflow and reusable teammate role skills.

interface.shortDescription: Event-bus orchestration and teammate role skills
interface.longDescription: Run teammate-style orchestration with the bundled teammate-orchestrator skill, then assign bounded research, implementation, and review work with dedicated teammate role skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $teammate-orchestrator to run a teammate workflow with checkpoints and retries.
Use $teammate-implementer to make one scoped change and report verification.
Use $teammate-reviewer to audit a teammate change for regressions.
